summary: Financial markets (US/India) closed today for Good Friday. Commodities remain active with crude oil futures firm. Art world active with new exhibitions including Artworks Around Town in Wheeling and various gallery openings in the US.
highlights: Global: US and Indian financial markets closed for Good Friday.
Commodities: Crude oil futures remain firm; gold seeing safe-haven interest.
Art: Multiple exhibitions opening today, including Artworks Around Town (Wheeling) and new displays in Dubuque and Rock Island.
